salesDayClosingTime.description:
Specifies at what time a [sales day](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces-and-platforms/settle-funds/sales-day-settlement#sales-day) ends.

Possible values: Time in **"HH:MM"** format. **HH** ranges from **00** to **07**. **MM** must be **00**.

Default value: **"00:00"**.

settlementDelayDays.description:
Specifies after how many business days the funds in a [settlement batch](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces-and-platforms/settle-funds/sales-day-settlement#settlement-batch) are made available.

Possible values: **0** to **10**, or **null**.
* Setting this value to an integer enables [Sales day settlement](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces-and-platforms/settle-funds/sales-day-settlement).
* Setting this value to **null** enables [Pass-through settlement](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces-and-platforms/settle-funds/pass-through-settlement).

Default value: **null**.
